instruction: A company received a grant, and decided to spend ${{\textstyle\frac{23}{32}}}$ of this grant in research and development next year. Out of the money set aside for research and development, ${{\textstyle\frac{20}{23}}}$ will be used to buy new equipment. What fraction of the grant will be used to buy new equipment? [ANS] of the grant will be used to buy new equipment.
